name: Trulimero Trulicina
lore:
Lore of Trulimero Trulicina
                                    


Trulimero Trulicina represents a fascinating hybrid creature, combining the traits of a cat and a fish, while uniquely possessing human legs. This unusual appearance was triggered by an incident involving Bombardiro Crocodilo, who bombarded a nearby beach, leading to the emergence of Trulimero's distinctive form.
In earlier iterations of this meme, the character was depicted as an orange goldfish adorned with a cat's head. Notably, this version did not include any legs, presenting a simpler design compared to later adaptations.
The most recognizable incarnation of this meme showcases a striking silver fish paired with the head of a tabby cat, complete with four human legs. This captivating creature is said to inhabit a picturesque beach setting, further enriching the lore surrounding Trulimero Trulicina.
Description original text
Trulimero Trulichima, il pretiletine in piscina, formaggio sulla trulalima, ma chi chiama la tazzina?
Trulimero Trulrich, Protestin in the pool, cheese in Trulalima , but who calls a cup?
